title: Ameriprise Financial Hosts its Annual Black Advisor Summit
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) recently hosted its annual Black Advisor Summit, bringing together advisors, field leaders and staff to celebrate and champion the success of Black financial advisors at the firm. The two-day event was held in Chicago in partnership with the firm's Black Empowerment Advisor Community Network (BEACN) and featured remarks from Ameriprise executives, BEACN leaders, and industry experts. title: Buyback Boosters: 3 Stocks Primed for Gains After Repurchase Moves
text: In 2022, U.S. companies did $1.22 trillion in stock buybacks. In the first half of 2023, S&P 500 companies have repurchased $385 billion in stock despite paying over $3 billion in tax on the share repurchases due to the 1% tax that went into effect on Jan. 1.

title: These 3 Companies Recently Unveiled Fresh Buyback Programs
text: In its simplest form, buybacks represent a company essentially re-investing in itself, undoubtedly a positive message for shareholders to hear.

title: Ameriprise Financial Inspires, Motivates and Empowers Women at Its Annual Women Advisor Summits
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--More than 800 advisors, staff members and corporate leaders from Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP) recently gathered in Minneapolis for the firm's annual Women Advisor Summits. Two separate three-day events featured compelling keynote speakers, insights from top women advisors and Ameriprise executives, and breakout sessions focused on practice growth and delivering exceptional client experiences. title: Ameriprise: Achieve Long-Term Wealth With This Compounder (Rating Upgrade)
text: Ameriprise Financial is an asset-light financial services company that has outperformed the S&P 500 over the past decade. The company reported strong Q2 results, with adjusted operating EPS growing 30% YoY and net revenue growing by 14% YoY. AMP has a strong balance sheet, attractive valuation, and a growing dividend, making it a potentially solid long-term investment for growth portfolios.
